word: G676 - ἀπρόσιτος - aprósitos - ap-ros'-ee-tos - Which no man can approach

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Which no man can approach
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a compound of G4314 and εἶμι eimi (to go); inaccessible: - which no man can approach.
